title: pinus laricio subsp. calabrica
intro: Pinus laricio subsp. calabrica, also known as Italian stone pine, is a subspecies of evergreen tree native to the Calabria region of Italy. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of terpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Pinus laricio subsp. calabrica include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Pinus laricio subsp. calabrica include essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
